data.name: strDecryptSyntax
data.value: Usage: --D <ciphertext>,<pos1>,<pos2>,<pos3>

data.name: strEasyMode
data.value: GERMAN ENIGMA MACHINE v2 COMMAND LINE ------------------------------------- You are currently in EASY mode of operation. The machine will auto reset after encrypting text. To switch to HISTORICALLY ACCURATE mode type: '--MODE REAL' ═══════════════════════ The Enigma Commands: --E, --D, --F, --R, --MODE, --Q To ENCRYPT a message: '--E <msg to encrypt>'. To DECRYPT a cipher text: '--D <encrypted msg>, rotor 1 settings, r2, r3' To DISABLE grouping the cipher text in sets of 5: '--F'. To RESET the Enigma machine and its rotors to setup for decryption: '--R'. To QUIT this program: '--Q'

data.name: strEncryptSyntax
data.value: Usage: --E <plaintext message>

data.name: strErrNumeric
data.value: Error: Please enter a numeric value.

data.name: strErrRotorValues
data.value: Error: Please enter a value between 0 and 25.

data.name: strInputNull
data.value: Please enter some text to encrypt.

data.name: strMachineInit
data.value: --- Enigma Machine Settings ---

data.name: strModeCmdErr
data.value: Unknown mode. Use: --MODE EASY or --MODE REAL

data.name: strModeCmdEZ
data.value: Mode set to EASY (auto-reset and simplified use).

data.name: strModeCmdReal
data.value: Mode set to REALISTIC (manual resets and full control).

data.name: strNotEasyMode
data.value: DEUTSCHE ENIGMA-MASCHINE v2 EINGABEAUFFORDERUNG ------------------------------------- You are currently in REAL mode of operation. The machine will not auto reset after encrypting text. To switch to EASY mode type: '--MODE EASY' ═══════════════════════ Die Enigma-Befehle: --E, --D, --F, --R, --MODE, --Q So VERSCHLÜSSELN Sie eine Nachricht: '--E <zu verschlüsselnde Nachricht>'. So ENTSCHLÜSSELN Sie einen Geheimtext: '--D <verschlüsselte Nachricht>, Rotor 1-Einstellungen, R2, R3'. Um die Gruppierung des Geheimtextes in Fünfgruppen zu DEAKTIVIEREN: '--F'. Um die Enigma-Maschine und ihre Rotoren ZURÜCKZUSETZEN: '--R'. Um das Programm zu BEENDEN: '--Q'

data.name: strNoteSettleOK
data.value: Rotor {0} successfully adjusted.

data.name: strNoteSettleRotor
data.value: Note: Rotor {0} settled at position {1} (slight misalignment).

data.name: strPreRotRotors
data.value: === ENIGMA MACHINE CONFIGURATION === Enter rotation settings for each rotor (0-25). These values represent the initial position of each rotor. ---------------------------------------

data.name: strPromRotorPos
data.value: Pre-rotate rotor {0} (0-25):

data.name: strQuit
data.value: Quitting Enigma v2...

data.name: strReset
data.value: Resetting machine rotors...

data.name: strSavedPosErr
data.value: Previous rotor settings were not saved, must reset manuallly.

data.name: strSettingsNA
data.value: Ring Settings: (not exposed) Plugboard: (not available) --------------------------------

data.name: strSuccessRot
data.value: --------------------------------------- Rotors have been successfully pre-rotated as follows:

data.name: strWarnEC
data.value: Warning: Poor electrical contact detected in rotor {0}. This may cause occasional encryption errors.

data.name: strWarnResistRotors
data.value: Warning: Slight resistance detected when setting rotor {0}. Attempting to adjust...
